name: LiveWire Group, Inc.
business: LiveWire Group, Inc. sells all-electric motorcycles under the LiveWire brand and electric balance bikes and pedal-assist electric bikes under the STACYC brand. Products are sold to independent dealers, through a company-owned dealership, online, and to independent distributors. The company also sells parts, accessories, and apparel for both segments.

exposures.sentence: LiveWire is an industry-leading all-electric motorcycle brand with a focus on pioneering the growing two-wheel electric motorcycle space.
The principal raw materials in Electric Motorcycles segment s products include battery cells, semi-conductor chips, steel and aluminum castings, forgings, steel sheet and bar.

catalysts.event: Planned production of two new 125 cc-equivalent mini-motos, the S4 Honcho products
catalysts.sentence: The Company is continuing to focus on strategic expansion of its product offerings, including the planned production in the spring of 2026 of two new 125 cc-equivalent mini-motos, the S4 Honcho TM products, which are designed to expand access and affordability for riders globally.
